creator: danfe@FreeBSD.org
text:
> FLTK upstream version is now 1.4.1, bringing new features like wayland
> and hidpi support.
Yes, but one thing at a time. :-)  Let's update the port to version 1.3.10 first and then decide how to deal with 1.4 branch (maybe we'd have to split the port into modern and previous stable versions, depending on the exp-run).
